title: security forward 재확장 (A-2 게이트 확장)
source_request: 남은 후보 한번에 처리 (security 노드 forward 재확장)
goal: widen the forward re-expansion gate from review to review-or-security so a security node with findings splices a fix + same-kind re-check round under the convergence budget

acceptance_criteria.statement: recordResult on a security node with has_findings true and budget remaining returns status passed and splices a fix node plus a security re-check node.
the spliced re-check node equals kind security and is owned by security-reviewer, depending on the fix node.
a security node with findings at the convergence budget returns status blocked with failure_class user_decision_needed and splices no nodes.
